ogTitle: Macorna vs Macs Cove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Macorna and Macs Cove.
heading: Macorna vs Macs Cove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macorna, Victoria and Macs Cove, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macorna has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Macs Cove (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macorna or Macs Cove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macorna has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Macs Cove scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macorna scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Macs Cove scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macorna or Macs Cove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macorna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
